BettingBetTypes.description: The list of the bet types that can be found within a market

BettingMarketTypes.description: A list of the possible Market Types within a Betting Event (e.g. Game Line, Team prop, Player Future, etc.)

BettingPeriodTypes.description: A list of the possible BettingPeriodTypes (e.g. Full Game; 1st-5th Inning; 1st Inning)

BettingEventTypes.description: A list of the possible BettingEventTypes (e.g. Game, Future)

BettingOutcomeTypes.description: A list of the possible BettingOutcomeTypes (e.g. Home; Away; Under; Over)

ResultedMarketMetaData.description: A list of the combinations of MarketType, BetType, & PeriodType which we willl provide automated resulting for

BettingResultTypes.description: A list of the possible BettingResultTypes (e.g. Win; Loss; Push; Not Resulted; Incomplete)
